master_row.title: EID_0522 Hamiltonian Operator Source
master_row.canonical_statement: If even a fraction of the predicted Planck-power-level vacuum energy can be tapped\u30100\u2020L37-L46\u3011\u30100\u2020L39-L41\u3011, it would revolutionize energy markets \u2013 imagine generators that, with no fuel, produce continuous power. This is of course a high bar, but our Hamiltonian includes that term which is the mathematical representation of exactly that phenomenon\u301035\u2020L137-L146\u3011\u301035\u2020L139-L147\u3011. Because gravity potentially couples in at TZP (through the term)\u30100\u2020L41-L49\u3011\u30100\u2020L43-L47\u3011, our device could also act as a lab-bench for quantum gravity tical proof-of-concept for a topologically unified quantum technology, but also a tangible and exciting roadmap to build it. breakthrough marks a reasoning pivot toward THE UNIFIED ENTANGLEMENT META-THEOREM: tical proof-of-concept for a topologically unified quantum technology,
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as a symbolic expression relating H, E, R.
